ValidationRule.description: VR enforcing users to ensure there is a shipping address associated with a Medication or Genetic Testing record type.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(StageName) = "Waiting For Approval", ISCHANGED(StageName), OR( ISBLANK(Shipping_Street_Address__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_City__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_State__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_Country__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_Zip_Code__c), ISNULL(Shipping_Street_Address__c), ISNULL(Shipping_City__c), ISNULL(Shipping_State__c), ISNULL(Shipping_Country__c), ISNULL(Shipping_Zip_Code__c), RecordType.Name = 'Medication', RecordType.Name = 'Genetic Testing' ) )
